# FCP Sports

> Elite basketball training facility in Fort Walton Beach, Florida serving the Emerald Coast — Destin, Niceville, Navarre, Crestview, Pensacola, Panama City.

FCP Sports is a dedicated 14,000 sq ft indoor basketball facility offering camps, leagues, training, private lessons, and open gym for athletes ages 5-18. Located in Fort Walton Beach, FL, we serve military families from Eglin AFB and Hurlburt Field with $20 military discounts on all programs.

## Programs

- [Basketball Camps](https://fcpsports.org/camps/): Summer day camps ($149/week), girls-only camp, elite showcase, spring break, holiday camps
- [Basketball Leagues](https://fcpsports.org/leagues/): Fall, summer, and little ballers seasons ($59-99, jersey included)
- [Kenny Anderson Clinics](https://fcpsports.org/camps/kenny-anderson-clinic/): Monthly clinics with NBA veteran ($49/session)
- [Skills Training](https://fcpsports.org/services/basketball-training/): Position-specific development
- [Private Lessons](https://fcpsports.org/services/basketball-lessons/): 1-on-1 coaching
- [Open Gym](https://fcpsports.org/services/open-gym/): Drop-in court access
- [Gym Rental](https://fcpsports.org/services/gym-rental/): Full court rental for teams and events

## Key Facts

- Location: Fort Walton Beach, FL 32547
- Phone: 850.961.2323
- Email: info@fcpsports.org
- Ages: 5-18
- Facility: 14,000 sq ft dedicated basketball gym, full regulation court, climate-controlled
- Military discount: $20 off all programs (Eglin AFB, Hurlburt Field)
- Coaching staff includes NBA veteran Kenny Anderson

## Pricing

- Summer Day Camp: $149/week (early bird $129)
- Girls-Only Camp: $149/week
- Elite Showcase: $129/2 days
- Spring Break Camp: $129/4 days
- Holiday Camp: $79/3 half-days
- Kenny Anderson Clinic: $49/session or $199 for 5
- League Registration: $59-99/season (jersey included)

## Service Area

Fort Walton Beach, Destin, Niceville, Navarre, Crestview, Pensacola, Panama City — the entire Florida Panhandle Emerald Coast region.
